reason: tests need rewrite, not instruction — solution_uniqueness_guard fails because test_no_math_round_around_total_reduce and test_no_math_round_around_invoice_reduce use regex to assert Math.round is absent rather than checking behavior. Alternative correct fixes (Math.floor, rounding helper, toFixed) fail the regex even though they produce correct output. This is a test problem. instruction.md passes behavior_in_task_description, no_solution_leakage, and instruction_no_hint_leakage.
